one_time_description: First Nations Drinking Water Settlement - non-recurring settlement payment of $500,000
economic_notes: Pesakastew Solar Limited Partnership (25.5% interest) completed a 10 MW solar farm with active agreement with SaskPower. FHQ Casino Holdings Ltd. (8.3% interest) holds a rental property. Red Dog Holdings Ltd. and Red Dog Holdings Limited Partnership consolidated. White Buffalo Calf Gaming Authority consolidated.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Comparative figures restated per Note 23 - correction of an error relating to investment in Pesakastew Solar Limited Partnership and corresponding grant revenue from Investing in Canada Infrastructure Program, increasing prior year investment and revenue by $1,477,341. New accounting standards adopted prospectively in 2023: PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations (resulted in $390,841 ARO liability, $297,680 net after accretion recovery of $93,161) and PS 3450 Financial Instruments. Consolidation includes Star Blanket Cree Nation, CMHC Housing Program, White Buffalo Calf Gaming Authority, Star Blanket Rentals, Red Dog Holdings Ltd., and Red Dog Holdings Limited Partnership. Star Blanket Treaty Land Entitlement Trust is excluded as not controlled. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $8,435,246 + CMHC $158,357 + NRCan $141,855 + ICIP $86,255 + Heritage Canada $72210 + University of Saskatchewan $53,510 + FHQ Tribal Council $484,021 + FSIN $33,000 + File Hills Community Health Services $12,780 + First Nations Drinking Water Settlement $500,000 + YTC Child & Family Services $181,736 - note some of these may be non-government; conservative estimate used. OSR includes rental income, First Nations Trust, and other revenue. num_gbes set to 2 for Pesakastew Solar LP and FHQ Casino Holdings accounted for at cost rather than equity method.
